business.name: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture
business.tagline: Handcrafted Cabinetry & Custom Furniture in Dallas

seo.title: Custom Cabinetry & Furniture | Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture Dallas
seo.description: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture in Dallas, TX crafts bespoke cabinetry, custom furniture, and built-ins. Expert carpenter serving Dallas with premium woodwork. Call (214) 328-8550.

hero.headline: Bespoke Cabinetry & Furniture Crafted for Your Home
hero.subheadline: From custom kitchen cabinets to heirloom-quality furniture, we bring your vision to life with precision and passion.

featureSections.title: Transform Your Kitchen with Handcrafted Cabinetry
featureSections.body: Your kitchen is the heart of your home. Our custom cabinets are built to your exact specifications, maximizing storage and style. We use premium hardwoods and finishes to create a space that is both beautiful and functional.
bullets: Wide selection of wood species and finishes
featureSections.cardBody: Choose from oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. Each piece is hand-selected for grain and color.

featureSections.title: Heirloom-Quality Furniture Built to Last
featureSections.body: From dining tables to bedroom sets, our custom furniture is designed to complement your style and stand the test of time. Every joint is hand-cut, every surface smooth to the touch.
bullets: Custom finishes to match your decor
featureSections.cardBody: We work with you from sketch to finish, ensuring every detail meets your expectations.

whyChooseUs.title: Master Craftsmanship
whyChooseUs.description: With over 25 years of experience, our carpenter brings unmatched skill and attention to detail to every project.

whyChooseUs.title: Premium Materials
whyChooseUs.description: We source only the finest hardwoods and hardware, ensuring durability and beauty for decades.

whyChooseUs.title: Custom Solutions
whyChooseUs.description: Every piece is built to your exact specifications — no templates, no compromises.

whyChooseUs.title: Exceptional Service
whyChooseUs.description: From consultation to installation, we prioritize clear communication and on-time delivery.

testimonials.quote: Purcell transformed our outdated kitchen into a showpiece. The craftsmanship is incredible — every drawer glides perfectly.
testimonials.author: Linda M.

testimonials.quote: We commissioned a custom dining table and it's the centerpiece of our home. Truly heirloom quality.
testimonials.author: Robert K.

testimonials.quote: Professional, punctual, and passionate about woodworking. Our built-in bookcases are flawless.
testimonials.author: Amanda S.

cta.headline: Ready to Start Your Project?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free consultation and estimate.

servicesPage.intro: At Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture, we specialize in creating custom woodwork that enhances your home. From kitchen remodels to one-of-a-kind furniture, our services are tailored to your needs.

services.title: Custom Kitchen Cabinets
services.shortDescription: Bespoke cabinetry designed to fit your space and style perfectly.
services.longDescription: We design and build custom kitchen cabinets from scratch, using premium materials and expert joinery. Every cabinet is tailored to your layout, storage needs, and aesthetic preferences.
benefits: Choice of wood, finish, and hardware

process.title: Consultation
process.description: We discuss your vision, measure your space, and recommend materials and designs.

process.title: Design & Quotation
process.description: We create detailed drawings and provide a transparent quote.

process.title: Build & Install
process.description: We craft your cabinets in our workshop and install them with precision.

faqs.question: How long does a custom kitchen cabinet project take?
faqs.answer: Typically 4-6 weeks from design approval to installation, depending on complexity.

faqs.question: Can you match existing cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can replicate styles and finishes to blend with your current cabinetry.

services.title: Custom Furniture
services.shortDescription: Handcrafted tables, chairs, beds, and more built to your specifications.
services.longDescription: Whether you need a farmhouse table, a platform bed, or a custom desk, we build furniture that reflects your personality and fits your home perfectly. Each piece is made with time-honored techniques.
benefits: Unique design tailored to your taste

process.title: Concept Meeting
process.description: We discuss your ideas, style preferences, and functional requirements.

process.title: Design & Approval
process.description: We produce sketches and a 3D model for your approval.

process.title: Crafting & Delivery
process.description: We build your piece and deliver it to your home.

faqs.question: What types of wood do you use?
faqs.answer: We work with oak, maple, cherry, walnut, and more. We can also source reclaimed wood.

faqs.question: Do you offer delivery and setup?
faqs.answer: Yes, we deliver and set up furniture within the Dallas area.

services.title: Built-In Shelving & Entertainment Centers
services.shortDescription: Custom built-ins that add character and storage to any room.
services.longDescription: Built-in shelving and entertainment centers maximize space and add architectural interest. We design and install custom units for living rooms, home offices, libraries, and more.

process.title: Site Visit
process.description: We take precise measurements and discuss your storage needs.

process.title: Design Proposal
process.description: We create a design with options for materials, finishes, and features.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We build and install the unit on-site for a perfect fit.

faqs.question: How much do built-ins cost?
faqs.answer: Cost varies by size and complexity. We provide a free estimate after consultation.

faqs.question: Can you incorporate lighting?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can add LED strip lights or puck lights to highlight your items.

services.title: Custom Trim & Millwork
services.shortDescription: Baseboards, crown molding, wainscoting, and more to elevate your interiors.
services.longDescription: Add elegance and character to your home with custom trim and millwork. We craft and install baseboards, crown molding, wainscoting, paneling, and decorative beams tailored to your home's architecture.
benefits: Matches existing or creates new look

process.title: Design Consultation
process.description: We review your space and recommend millwork styles that complement your home.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: Choose from MDF, solid wood, or composites based on budget and look.

process.title: Installation & Finish
process.description: We install and finish all trim for a seamless appearance.

faqs.question: Do you offer painting or staining?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can prime and paint or stain to match your color scheme.

faqs.question: Can you replicate historic moldings?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We can match existing profiles or recreate period-appropriate designs.

about.headline: Our Story: Crafting Excellence in Dallas
about.mission: To create beautiful, functional woodwork that enriches homes and stands the test of time.
story: Purcell Cabinetry & Furniture was founded over two decades ago with a simple mission: bring heirloom-quality craftsmanship to every home in Dallas. What started as a one-man workshop has grown into a trusted name for custom cabinetry, furniture, and millwork. Our founder, a master carpenter with a passion for wood, built the business on principles of integrity, precision, and personalized service.

Today, we continue that tradition. Every project — whether a full kitchen remodel or a single piece of furniture — receives the same dedication to quality. We source the finest materials, employ time-honored techniques, and work closely with each client to ensure the final result exceeds expectations. We're proud to be part of the Dallas community and to see our work in homes across the city.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We never cut corners. Every joint, finish, and detail meets our high standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: Honest pricing, clear communication, and promises kept.

coreValues.title: Collaboration
coreValues.description: Your vision guides our work. We listen, advise, and deliver.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: We are lifelong learners, constantly refining our skills and techniques.

contact.headline: Let's Create Something Beautiful Together
contact.subheadline: Ready to discuss your project? We'd love to hear from you.
